name: ticktick-mcp-bridge
description: Self-hosted TickTick MCP server for ChatGPT, Codex, and other MCP clients.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.mjs && node --check src/mcp-handler.mjs && node --check src/transports/stdio.mjs && node --check src/tools.mjs && node --check src/ticktick-api.mjs && node --check src/ticktick-data.mjs && node --check src/task-operations.mjs && node --check src/habit-operations.mjs && node --check src/focus-operations.mjs && node --check src/diagnostics.mjs && node --check src/auth-store.mjs && node --check src/chatgpt-oauth.mjs && node --check scripts/test-inbox.mjs && node --check scripts/test-task-operations.mjs && node --check scripts/test-official-openapi-tools.mjs && node --check scripts/test-mcp-validation.mjs && node --check scripts/qa-ticktick-mcp.mjs
scripts.test: node scripts/test-inbox.mjs && node scripts/test-task-operations.mjs && node scripts/test-official-openapi-tools.mjs && node scripts/test-mcp-validation.mjs
